input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 6 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "gi", "count": 4, "message": "4 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": 1200, "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: []. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Six incoming patients are expected. A GI cluster of four patients has been detected, prompting an infection control alert and requiring activation of the GI cluster protocol. Capacity is stable for the next two hours, and no diversions are recommended at this time.
